channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "Bomb Them": Trump Says He's Left Instructions If Iran Assassinates Him

media:content.media:description: After the NATO Summit, Trump swapped his plans while travelling back to the US

item.description: When asked about the new plot by Iran to assassinate him that Israel warned about, US President Donald Trump said that there were no new plans. However, he claimed that Iran has wanted him dead for years.
item.content:encoded: When asked about the new plot by Iran to assassinate him that Israel warned about, US President Donald Trump said that there were no new plans. However, he claimed that Iran has wanted him dead for years.

item.title: India-Australia Ties Enter New Phase With Uranium, Critical Mineral Exports

media:content.media:description: Australia has the geological advantage but needs greater investment to move beyond extraction

item.description: The centrepiece of the visit was a fresh push on uranium exports to India, an idea first floated under the 2015 civil nuclear agreement but which failed to gain real traction after an earlier attempt in 2010.
item.content:encoded: The centrepiece of the visit was a fresh push on uranium exports to India, an idea first floated under the 2015 civil nuclear agreement but which failed to gain real traction after an earlier attempt in 2010.

item.title: France Wildfires Burn Twice As Much Land As Last Year: Report

media:content.media:description: The European nation is facing its third heatwave since May

item.description: Wildfires have scorched twice as much land in France so far this year as in the same period last year, an official said on Friday.
item.content:encoded: Wildfires have scorched twice as much land in France so far this year as in the same period last year, an official said on Friday.

item.title: Congo Ebola Outbreak Still Spreading Largely Undetected: WHO

media:content.media:description: About 90% of all reported cases remain concentrated in Ituri province

item.description: Four out of every five new Ebola cases in parts of Democratic Republic of Congo have no known link to existing patients, a senior World Health Organisation official said.
item.content:encoded: Four out of every five new Ebola cases in parts of Democratic Republic of Congo have no known link to existing patients, a senior World Health Organisation official said.

item.title: One Million Women Lose Access To Vital Support Amid Aid Cuts: UN
item.description: Sixty-five percent of women-led organisations reported staff working without pay to keep services running, while nearly half reported rising staff burnout.
item.content:encoded: Sixty-five percent of women-led organisations reported staff working without pay to keep services running, while nearly half reported rising staff burnout.

item.title: Suspected Chinese State-Linked Hackers Spying On 'All-Weather Friend' Pakistan

media:content.media:description: Chinese hackers carried out intrusions into the digital infrastructure of the police forces of Pakistan

item.description: According to US cyber threat intelligence firm SentinelLabs, Chinese hackers carried out intrusions into the digital infrastructure of the police forces of Balochistan, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, and Islamabad.
item.content:encoded: According to US cyber threat intelligence firm SentinelLabs, Chinese hackers carried out intrusions into the digital infrastructure of the police forces of Balochistan, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, and Islamabad.

item.title: Pakistan's Masterclass In Selective Outrage: Deporting Afghans While Preaching Brotherhood

media:content.media:description: Pakistan's domestic policies reflect a broader geopolitical truth

item.description: When dealing with its own long-standing refugee population, Pakistan has adopted the very arguments it once criticized: national security and economic preservation
item.content:encoded: When dealing with its own long-standing refugee population, Pakistan has adopted the very arguments it once criticized: national security and economic preservation

item.title: 'Agreed To Continue Talks, But Ceasefire Over': Trump's Mixed Iran Message

media:content.media:description: Trump said US has agreed to continue talks for peace only because Iran has asked to continue it

item.description: Taking to Truth Social on Friday, Trump said that the United States has agreed to continue talks for peace only because Iran has asked to continue it. However, he clarified that the ceasefire stands terminated despite the ongoing talks.
item.content:encoded: Taking to Truth Social on Friday, Trump said that the United States has agreed to continue talks for peace only because Iran has asked to continue it. However, he clarified that the ceasefire stands terminated despite the ongoing talks.

item.title: NATO Wants Members To Spend 5% Of GDP On Defence, Only Two Already Do

media:content.media:description: Both Lithuania and Estonia sit on NATO's eastern flank

item.description: At the NATO Summit in Ankara, alliance leaders endorsed a new defence spending benchmark of 5% of GDP, significantly higher than NATO's long-standing 2% target.
item.content:encoded: At the NATO Summit in Ankara, alliance leaders endorsed a new defence spending benchmark of 5% of GDP, significantly higher than NATO's long-standing 2% target.

item.title: Kerala Student Killed In Uzbekistan, Family Claims Conversion Attempt, Torture

media:content.media:description: Police said they will coordinate with authorities in Uzbekistan through the Indian Embassy

item.description: The FIR was filed at Haripad police station on Wednesday after the victim's parents approached the Alappuzha District Police Chief, officials said. A postmortem examination was also conducted at Alappuzha Medical College as part of the investigation.
item.content:encoded: The FIR was filed at Haripad police station on Wednesday after the victim's parents approached the Alappuzha District Police Chief, officials said. A postmortem examination was also conducted at Alappuzha Medical College as part of the investigation.

item.title: Burglar's Truck Stolen In Middle Of Robbing Store, Police Officer Says 'That's Karma'

media:content.media:description: Howard County Police detain man following truck theft and Verizon store break-in in Maryland.

item.description: A US man was hit with instant "karma" after his truck was stolen while he was in the midst of robbing a Verizon store.
item.content:encoded: A US man was hit with instant "karma" after his truck was stolen while he was in the midst of robbing a Verizon store.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | US-Iran MoU Collapse: Why The Strait Of Hormuz Is Back On The Brink
item.description: Why did the ceasefire fail? Could it have been prevented? The answer to many of these questions lies in the framing of the 14-Point MoU and the uneven playfield that it created.
item.content:encoded: Why did the ceasefire fail? Could it have been prevented? The answer to many of these questions lies in the framing of the 14-Point MoU and the uneven playfield that it created.

item.title: Head And Shoulders Outside: Man Nearly Sucked Out Of Flight As Window Detaches

media:content.media:description: Passengers had woken up to a sound like that of a tyre bursting and screams

item.description: The passenger was a tourist from Serbia who was travelling from Thessaloniki in Greece to Memmingen in Germany. He was hospitalised with friction burns but was otherwise in good condition.
item.content:encoded: The passenger was a tourist from Serbia who was travelling from Thessaloniki in Greece to Memmingen in Germany. He was hospitalised with friction burns but was otherwise in good condition.

item.title: 'May Arrest Or Kill Me': Hasina Says She'll Return To Bangladesh By December

media:content.media:description: Bangladesh has repeatedly urged India to extradite Sheikh Hasina.

item.description: Sheikh Hasina fled Bangladesh in 2024 after protests ended her 20 years as prime minister across multiple terms.
item.content:encoded: Sheikh Hasina fled Bangladesh in 2024 after protests ended her 20 years as prime minister across multiple terms.

item.title: Change "Addictive Design" Or Face Heavy Fine: EU Warns Meta

media:content.media:description: The EU began its probe into Meta in 2024 under the Digital Services Act. (Representational)

item.description: Brussels accused the US tech giant of failing to limit the risks the platforms posed to users, especially children and vulnerable adults, because of features designed to keep them on Facebook and Instagram.
item.content:encoded: Brussels accused the US tech giant of failing to limit the risks the platforms posed to users, especially children and vulnerable adults, because of features designed to keep them on Facebook and Instagram.

item.title: Why India Is Focussing On Myanmar As Part Of Its Act East Policy

media:content.media:description: Myanmar sits in a strategically important position and shares a 1,643-kilometre-long border with India

item.description: India is seeking to enhance its cooperation with Myanmar in line with our 'Act East' and 'Neighbourhood First' policies.
item.content:encoded: India is seeking to enhance its cooperation with Myanmar in line with our 'Act East' and 'Neighbourhood First' policies.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | By Trump, For Trump: Inside The Murky Election Crisis America Is Sleepwalking Into
item.description: Trump has learnt that overturning an election after losing is extraordinarily difficult. This time, he is shaping the battlefield before America votes.
item.content:encoded: Trump has learnt that overturning an election after losing is extraordinarily difficult. This time, he is shaping the battlefield before America votes.

item.title: Israel's Rafael Turns To India For Iron Dome Missiles: Sources

media:content.media:description: Amid global conflicts, demand for air defence systems is rising worldwide.

item.description: If rationalised, the deal can also add greater momentum to India's Make-in-India vision and further reinforce New Delhi as a credible and trusted defence partner in the region.
item.content:encoded: If rationalised, the deal can also add greater momentum to India's Make-in-India vision and further reinforce New Delhi as a credible and trusted defence partner in the region.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | DMK's Strength Is Becoming Its Weakness - And Nobody Is Happier Than Vijay
item.description: DMK is fast closing doors that perhaps needed to be kept open.
item.content:encoded: DMK is fast closing doors that perhaps needed to be kept open.

item.title: Chits In Walls, Meets In Park: How Italian Spies Sold NATO Secrets To Russia

media:content.media:description: Iralian spy met his Russian contact in parks and bars

item.description: The 59-year-old retired spy received Euro 4,000 in cash, the agreed-upon price for each highly classified piece of information, after every exchange.
item.content:encoded: The 59-year-old retired spy received Euro 4,000 in cash, the agreed-upon price for each highly classified piece of information, after every exchange.
